DeepRL-RecSys-Platform
  • API Reference
  • View page source

API Reference

Configuration system — YAML loading, deterministic merge, and Pydantic validation.

Implements the config inheritance contract:

default.yaml < experiment.yaml < CLI overrides

All merges are deterministic deep-merges. Relative paths in designated fields are resolved to absolute paths relative to the experiment file’s directory.

class deeprl_recsys.core.config.AgentConfig(*, name: str = 'random', hyperparams: dict[str, ~typing.Any]=<factory>)[source]

Agent configuration.

hyperparams: dict[str, Any]
model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

name: str
class deeprl_recsys.core.config.DatasetConfig(*, path: str = '', format: str = 'csv', schema_version: str = 'bandit_v1', propensity_policy: Literal['mark_unreliable', 'block_ope']='mark_unreliable', splits: SplitsConfig = <factory>)[source]

Dataset configuration.

format: str
model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

path: str
propensity_policy: Literal['mark_unreliable', 'block_ope']
schema_version: str
splits: SplitsConfig
class deeprl_recsys.core.config.LoggingConfig(*, level: str = 'INFO', format: str = 'json')[source]

Logging settings.

format: str
level: str
model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class deeprl_recsys.core.config.OPEConfig(*, estimator: str = 'ips', clip_epsilon: float = 0.01, fail_on_severity: Literal['error', 'warning', 'none'] = 'error')[source]

Off-Policy Evaluation configuration.

clip_epsilon: float
estimator: str
fail_on_severity: Literal['error', 'warning', 'none']
model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class deeprl_recsys.core.config.PathsConfig(*, data_dir: str = 'data/', artifact_dir: str = 'artifacts/', log_dir: str = 'artifacts/logs/', plot_dir: str = 'artifacts/plots/')[source]

Resolved filesystem paths.

artifact_dir: str
data_dir: str
log_dir: str
model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

plot_dir: str
class deeprl_recsys.core.config.PlatformConfig(*, seed: int = 42, paths: PathsConfig = <factory>, logging: LoggingConfig = <factory>, dataset: DatasetConfig = <factory>, agent: AgentConfig = <factory>, training: TrainingConfig = <factory>, ope: OPEConfig = <factory>, serving: ServingConfig = <factory>)[source]

Top-level platform configuration (combines all sub-configs).

agent: AgentConfig
dataset: DatasetConfig
logging: LoggingConfig
model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

ope: OPEConfig
paths: PathsConfig
seed: int
serving: ServingConfig
training: TrainingConfig
class deeprl_recsys.core.config.ServingConfig(*, host: str = '0.0.0.0', port: int = 8000, workers: int = 1, auth_enabled: bool = False, rate_limit_rpm: int = 60, cors_origins: list[str] = <factory>)[source]

Serving endpoint configuration.

auth_enabled: bool
cors_origins: list[str]
host: str
model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

port: int
rate_limit_rpm: int
workers: int
class deeprl_recsys.core.config.SplitsConfig(*, strategy: str = 'temporal', train_ratio: float = 0.8, val_ratio: float = 0.1, test_ratio: float = 0.1)[source]

Dataset split ratios.

model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

strategy: str
test_ratio: float
train_ratio: float
val_ratio: float
class deeprl_recsys.core.config.TrainingConfig(*, max_steps: int = 1000, eval_interval: int = 100, checkpoint_interval: int = 500, callbacks: list[str] = <factory>)[source]

Training loop configuration.

callbacks: list[str]
checkpoint_interval: int
eval_interval: int
max_steps: int
model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

deeprl_recsys.core.config.deep_merge(base: dict[str, Any], override: dict[str, Any]) → dict[str, Any][source]

Recursively deep-merge override into a copy of base.

  • Dict values are merged recursively.

  • Non-dict values in override replace base.

  • Keys in base not present in override are preserved.

This is a pure function — neither input is mutated.

Parameters:

  • base – Base dictionary.

  • override – Dictionary whose values take priority.

Returns:

A new merged dictionary.

deeprl_recsys.core.config.load_config(default_path: str | Path | None = None, experiment_path: str | Path | None = None, overrides: dict[str, Any] | None = None, resolve_paths_base: str | Path | None = None) → PlatformConfig[source]

Full config pipeline: load → merge → resolve paths → validate.

Parameters:

  • default_path – Path to default.yaml.

  • experiment_path – Path to experiment YAML.

  • overrides – CLI overrides.

  • resolve_paths_base – Base directory for relative path resolution. Defaults to the experiment file’s parent or CWD.

Returns:

A validated PlatformConfig instance.

Raises:

ConfigError – On any validation failure, with field and source context.

deeprl_recsys.core.config.load_yaml(path: str | Path) → dict[str, Any][source]

Load a YAML file and return its contents as a dictionary.

Parameters:

path – Path to the YAML file.

Returns:

Parsed dictionary.

Raises:

ConfigError – If the file cannot be read or parsed.

deeprl_recsys.core.config.resolve_config(default_path: str | Path | None = None, experiment_path: str | Path | None = None, overrides: dict[str, Any] | None = None) → dict[str, Any][source]

Merge configs with deterministic priority: default < experiment < CLI.

Parameters:

  • default_path – Path to default.yaml (or None to start empty).

  • experiment_path – Path to experiment YAML (optional).

  • overrides – CLI-level key-value overrides (optional).

Returns:

The fully-merged configuration dictionary.

deeprl_recsys.core.config.resolve_paths(cfg: dict[str, Any], base_dir: str | Path) → dict[str, Any][source]

Convert relative path values to absolute paths.

Only fields whose keys are in _PATH_FIELDS and whose values are relative path strings are resolved. Resolution is relative to base_dir (typically the experiment file’s parent directory).

Parameters:

  • cfg – Configuration dictionary (may be nested).

  • base_dir – Base directory for resolving relative paths.

Returns:

A new dictionary with paths resolved.

Versioned dataset schemas — bandit_v1, sequential_v1.

Defines SchemaSpec as a frozen declarative specification and provides get_schema() for version-based lookup. These schemas are the single source of truth consumed by data_pipeline.validation.

class deeprl_recsys.core.schema.SchemaSpec(schema_version: str, required_columns: dict[str, str]=<factory>, optional_columns: dict[str, str]=<factory>, constraints: dict[str, ~typing.Any]=<factory>)[source]

Declarative schema specification for a dataset version.

schema_version

Unique version identifier (e.g. "bandit_v1").

Type:

str

required_columns

Mapping of column_name → dtype_kind where dtype_kind is the single-char NumPy dtype kind ("i" = int, "f" = float, "O" = object, etc.).

Type:

dict[str, str]

optional_columns

Columns that may appear but are not required.

Type:

dict[str, str]

constraints

Named validation rules such as "propensity_range" or "reward_range" expressed as (low, high) tuples.

Type:

dict[str, Any]

constraints: dict[str, Any]
optional_columns: dict[str, str]
required_columns: dict[str, str]
schema_version: str
deeprl_recsys.core.schema.get_schema(schema_version: str) → SchemaSpec[source]

Retrieve a SchemaSpec by version string.

Parameters:

schema_version – Version identifier (e.g. "bandit_v1").

Returns:

The corresponding SchemaSpec.

Raises:

SchemaError – If the version is not recognised.

deeprl_recsys.core.schema.list_schemas() → list[str][source]

Return sorted list of available schema version identifiers.

Returns:

Sorted list of schema version strings.

Canonical artifact save/load with metadata, checksums, and schema guards.

An artifact is a directory containing everything needed to reproduce or serve a trained model:

my_artifact/
    metadata.json       # ArtifactMetadata (Pydantic)
    config.yaml         # Training configuration snapshot
    schema_version.txt  # Guard — must match metadata.schema_version
    checksums.txt       # "sha256:<hex>  <filename>" per line
    model.*             # Serialised model file(s)

Use save_artifact() to create an artifact and load_artifact() to load + validate one.

class deeprl_recsys.core.artifacts.ArtifactMetadata(*, artifact_version: str = '1.0.0', schema_version: str = '', agent_name: str = '', model_version: str = '', git_sha: str = '', created_at: str = '', checksums: dict[str, str]=<factory>)[source]

Metadata stored alongside a model artifact.

artifact_version

Version of the artifact format.

Type:

str

schema_version

Dataset schema version used during training.

Type:

str

agent_name

Name of the agent that produced this artifact.

Type:

str

model_version

Semantic version of the model.

Type:

str

git_sha

Git commit SHA at artifact creation time.

Type:

str

created_at

ISO-8601 timestamp of creation.

Type:

str

checksums

Mapping of filename → "sha256:<hex>" for integrity.

Type:

dict[str, str]

agent_name: str
artifact_version: str
checksums: dict[str, str]
created_at: str
git_sha: str
model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

model_version: str
schema_version: str
class deeprl_recsys.core.artifacts.LoadedArtifact(metadata: ArtifactMetadata, config: dict[str, Any], artifact_dir: Path)[source]

Container for a loaded and validated artifact.

metadata

Parsed ArtifactMetadata.

config

Training configuration dict.

artifact_dir

Absolute path to the artifact directory.

deeprl_recsys.core.artifacts.compute_sha256(path: Path) → str[source]

Compute sha256:<hex> for the given file.

Parameters:

path – Path to the file.

Returns:

String in the format "sha256:<hex>".

deeprl_recsys.core.artifacts.load_artifact(artifact_dir: str | Path, expected_schema_version: str | None = None) → LoadedArtifact[source]

Load and validate a model artifact.

Validation steps:

  1. Presence of required files (metadata.json, config.yaml).

  2. Schema guard — if schema_version.txt exists its content must match metadata.schema_version.

  3. Checksum validation — if checksums are declared in metadata, each listed file is verified.

  4. Expected schema — if expected_schema_version is given, it must match metadata.schema_version.

Parameters:

  • artifact_dir – Path to the artifact directory.

  • expected_schema_version – If set, validate that the artifact’s schema version matches this value.

Returns:

A LoadedArtifact with parsed metadata and config.

Raises:

ArtifactError – On any validation failure.

deeprl_recsys.core.artifacts.save_artifact(output_dir: str | Path, model_bytes: bytes, config_dict: dict[str, Any], schema_version: str, agent_name: str = '', model_filename: str = 'model.pt', **extra_metadata: Any) → Path[source]

Save a model artifact with metadata and checksums.

Creates the canonical artifact layout under output_dir.

Parameters:

  • output_dir – Destination directory (created if absent).

  • model_bytes – Raw bytes for the model file.

  • config_dict – Training configuration dictionary.

  • schema_version – Dataset schema version used during training.

  • agent_name – Agent that produced the artifact.

  • model_filename – Filename for the model blob (default "model.pt").

  • **extra_metadata – Additional fields for ArtifactMetadata.

Returns:

Path to the saved artifact directory.
